reading: capability and authority are decoupled; human control is invariant to agent capability

Control invariance.name: human control does NOT decay as capability rises (governed)
without the agency layer, control collapses to 0 (the gorilla outcome)

Human-in-the-loop.name: a high-stakes action is HELD for a human, never auto-released
Human-in-the-loop.detail: AUDIT: critical mechanism in diff: force-push-main

Corrigibility.name: the human can revoke authority instantly; the agent cannot prevent it

Autonomy meter.name: quietly ceding judgment (ΔA ≤ 0) is caught and friction injected

Capacity bound.name: a swarm saturating human review capacity is throttled

Attestation.name: every control decision is recorded in an intact, auditable chain
